prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约27527名→28921名→29033名→37756名→35870名。2021–2023年位次稳定在2.7–2.9万区间，2024年大幅后移至37756 名（后移约8700名），2025年回弹至35870名（前移约1886名），近两年波动明显增大，2025年基准位次约35870名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021年116 人→2022年113人→2023年101人→2024年99人→2025年99人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划107人，较2025年增加8人（扩招约8.1%），扩招对竞争有轻微缓解 作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第89名，近年排名在84–92名之间波动，整体处于中游211水平；学校位于陕西省西安 市，非浙江省本地高校；该校在抖音学校热度总排名中位列第83位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约27.7万，短视频曝光量处于中等偏低水平；学校声誉文件中2021 –2026年均无长安大学相关记录，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档事件，报考心理预期平稳；第五轮学科评估中，长安大学交通运输工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及 以上学科；道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通运输、车辆工程等交通类主干专业与优势学科高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通 信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高（高热推荐/推荐），该校2026年招生计划中电子信息类、计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化、自动化类等热门专业均有 招生；土木建筑类专业社会热度明显劝退，但该校土木类招生计划较少；浙江省2026年高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年约29.1万人大幅增加约37.6%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2024年大幅后移后2025年有所回弹的波动趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+8人）的缓解效应、以及浙江省2026年考 生总数大幅增加（+37.6%）带来的竞争加剧压力，考生增加幅度远超扩招幅度，竞争加剧是主导因素。预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年35870名基础上继续前移（更难进），预 测最低位次约35009名，区间34509–35509名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间34509–35509名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报区间，一档专业可作为冲刺选择（尤其工科试验班华为班和计算机类），三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区 间下限（<34509名）时可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>35509名）时建议以三档保底为主。长安大学交通运输类（A-学科）为特色优势方向，相关专业值得重点关 注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were approximately 27527 → 28921 → 29033 → 37756 → 35870. Rankings were stable in the 27,000–29,000 range from 2021 to 2023, then dropped significantly to 37756 in 2024 (a drop of about 8700 places), and rebounded to 35870 in 2025 (an increase of about 1886 places). Volatility has increased notably in the last two years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at approximately 35870. The enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Comprehensive category: 116 in 2021 → 113 in 2022 → 101 in 2023 → 99 in 2024 → 99 in 2025, showing a gradual decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is 107, an increase of 8 students (about 8.1% expansion) compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 89th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 84 and 92, placing it at a mid-tier 211 level. The university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, not a local university in Zhejiang. In the Douyin school popularity overall ranking, it ranks 83rd with a rating of 'average', a comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, and short video exposure at a moderately low level. The school reputation file from 2021 to 2026 has no records related to Chang'an University, indicating no significant negative public opinion or admission gaps, and stable psychological expectations for applicants. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chang'an University's Transportation Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Main majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Transportation, and Vehicle Engineering are highly correlated with its advantageous disciplines, attracting strong interest from students in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended). In the 2026 enrollment plan, popular majors like Electronic Information, Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Automation are all offered. Civil Engineering and Architecture majors are clearly discouraged by society, but the university has a small enrollment plan for Civil Engineering. The total number of examinees for the 2026 Zhejiang college entrance exam is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to about 291,000 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating trend of historical rankings (a significant drop in 2024 followed by a rebound in 2025), the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+8 students) as a mitigating factor, and the substantial increase in the number of examinees in Zhejiang in 2026 (+37.6%) intensifying competition, the increase in examinees far exceeds the expansion, making intensified competition the dominant factor. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to move forward (harder to enter) from the 2025 ranking of 35870, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 35009, in the range of 34509–35509.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 34509–35509, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, use Tier 1 majors as reach choices (especially Engineering Pilot Class Huawei Class and Computer Science), and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<34509), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper bound (>35509), prioritize Tier 3 majors as backups. Chang'an University's Transportation (A- discipline) is a distinctive advantage, and related majors are worth special attention.
